title: CBT Tools — Revit Telemetry, Plugins & Live BIM Dashboard
description: An internal BIM analytics platform connecting Revit C# add-ins, MongoDB, WebSockets, and a React dashboard to monitor model performance, active users, sync behavior, and internal tool adoption across project teams.
highlights: Captures model opening time, sync duration, warning count, file size, and crash status
Tracks active Revit users, open documents, active views, and project activity using heartbeat data
Logs plugin usage to understand internal tool adoption and workflow impact
Connects native Revit event data to dashboard-ready MongoDB collections

title: Rental Lease Visualizer — 3D Leasing Analytics Platform
description: A web-based 3D leasing analytics viewer that combines Rhino building geometry with Excel lease data to visualize unit occupancy, rent metrics, and leasing activity over time through an interactive Three.js interface.
highlights: Loaded Rhino 3DM building geometry into a React and Three.js viewer using Rhino3dmLoader
Mapped Excel-based lease data to individual apartment units for interactive occupancy visualization
Built timeline controls to explore leasing status across different dates
Added hover and click interactions for viewing unit-level lease details, rent, area, and occupancy status
Created 2D and 3D view modes for switching between analytical floor-level review and spatial building exploration
Designed visual leasing analytics including rent-per-square-foot buckets, floor-level unit counts, and occupancy breakdowns
